headline: Full Stack Developer | React · Node.js · Laravel · Python · SaaS · REST APIs
description: Full Stack Developer with experience building, maintaining and integrating web applications, REST APIs, SaaS platforms and automation-oriented digital solutions.
about-paragraphs: I am a Full Stack Developer with experience creating, maintaining and integrating web applications, REST APIs, SaaS platforms and automation-focused digital solutions. I work across frontend and backend, relational and NoSQL databases, external integrations and scalable product development.

I use JavaScript, PHP and Python with technologies like Laravel, Node.js, Express, FastAPI and React to build APIs, backend services and modern web applications. I also work with Next.js, Firebase, MySQL, MongoDB, GraphQL and Docker.

My approach combines technical quality, user experience, SaaS architecture and AI integration in digital products. I mainly work on backend systems and web applications that process information from multiple communication channels such as WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook and Telegram.
I am also exploring AI agent development and automation tools to embed AI capabilities into SaaS products and optimize workflows.

This year I am expanding my focus into DevOps and cloud infrastructure, strengthening skills in deployment automation, infrastructure as code, service monitoring and resilient scalable architecture design.

My professional goal is to evolve toward designing complete systems where software engineering, artificial intelligence and DevOps practices operate as an integrated approach inside modern SaaS products.
additional-info: Profile oriented to SaaS products, automation and applied artificial intelligence.
Able to work independently or collaboratively in dynamic technical environments.
Active interest in DevOps, cloud infrastructure, CI/CD and AI agents.
